message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in nested_captures.zig and scope_analyzer.zig

nested_captures.zig:
- Add with_stmt, match_stmt handlers to findOuterRefsInNode

scope_analyzer.zig:
- Add while_stmt, try_stmt, with_stmt, match_stmt handlers to collectAllVarRefsInStmt
- Add try_stmt else_body/finalbody, for_stmt/while_stmt orelse_body to collectInnerScopeDecls
- Add match_stmt handler to collectInnerScopeDecls
